metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing the grok-plugin-cc Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: grok
plugins.description: Use xAI's Grok from Claude Code: ask, research (effort=max + live web search + --check self-verification), review, adversarial-review, imagine, imagine-video, parallel best-of-N branches, model picker, and long-form rescue via subagent. Wraps the local `grok` CLI (xAI Grok Build) with env scrubbing, ANSI sanitization, capability probing, TOCTOU/symlink defenses, prompt-injection defenses, and an optional stop-time review gate.
